examples: Friday 31 July 1925 henceforth became known as 'Red Friday'.
Henceforth all branches of the naval officer corps were equal to one another.
Henceforth I will be a very different Toad.
Soon afterwards, forum organisers were told they would henceforth need to apply for police permission.
In turn, the Board will henceforth include two members from the Commission, designated by the President.
